featureSections.title: Certified Technicians & Advanced Diagnostics
featureSections.body: Our team of ASE-certified technicians uses state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to accurately identify and fix issues fast. We stay current with the latest automotive technology to ensure your vehicle gets the best care.
featureSections.cardBody: Every service includes a multi-point inspection to catch potential problems early.

featureSections.title: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
featureSections.body: We believe in upfront pricing and clear communication. Before any work begins, you'll receive a detailed estimate with no hidden fees. Our goal is to provide high-quality repairs at fair prices.
bullets: Itemized invoices with parts and labor
featureSections.cardBody: All repairs are backed by our comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: Our ASE-certified technicians have the training and experience to handle any repair, from routine maintenance to complex engine work.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We value your time. Most repairs are completed same-day or within 24 hours, so you can get back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees, no upsells. We provide clear estimates upfront and explain every recommendation in plain English.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: We stand behind our work with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty and a 100% satisfaction promise.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Dallas Auto Repair difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine oil changes to major engine repairs, Dallas Auto Repair offers comprehensive auto services for all makes and models. Our certified technicians use top-tier equipment and parts to keep your vehicle running smoothly.

services.title: Oil Change & Filter Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes using premium synthetic and conventional oils.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the most important maintenance for your vehicle's longevity. Our technicians drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the manufacturer-recommended oil grade. We also perform a complimentary fluid check and tire pressure inspection.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check your current oil level, condition, and filter.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: Old oil is drained and disposed of properly; new oil and filter installed.

process.title: Final Check
process.description: We verify oil level, check for leaks, and reset maintenance light.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic oil options to match your vehicle's requirements.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with professional brake inspections, pad replacement, and rotor resurfacing.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines to identify wear. Our service includes high-quality pads and resurfacing or replacement of rotors to ensure smooth, quiet stopping.

process.title: Diagnostic
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check fluid levels.

process.title: Service
process.description: Worn pads and rotors are replaced with premium parts, and calipers are inspected.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test the brakes at various speeds to ensure proper function and pedal feel.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal. If you notice any of these, bring your car in for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does a brake job take?
faqs.answer: Most brake repairs are completed within 2-3 hours, depending on the extent of work needed.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnosis and repair of engine issues using advanced scanners and expert analysis.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or performance drops, our technicians use OEM-level diagnostic tools to pinpoint the problem. We explain the issue in simple terms and provide a clear repair plan, whether it's a sensor replacement, fuel system repair, or major engine work.

process.title: Scan & Assess
process.description: We connect a diagnostic scanner to read error codes and live data.

process.title: In-Depth Testing
process.description: Additional tests (compression, vacuum, fuel pressure) confirm the root cause.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We perform the repair, clear codes, and test drive to ensure the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: What does the check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We recommend getting it checked promptly to avoid further damage.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on engine repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, all engine repairs are covered by our 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

services.title: Tire Services: Rotation, Balance & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Extend tire life and improve handling with professional rotation, balancing, and new tire installation.
services.longDescription: Proper tire maintenance is key to safety and fuel economy. We rotate and balance tires to ensure even wear, and we can mount and balance new tires from top brands. We also check alignment and tire pressure to maximize performance.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check tread depth, wear patterns, and tire pressure.

process.title: Rotation & Balance
process.description: Tires are rotated per manufacturer specs and balanced to eliminate vibrations.

process.title: Installation (if needed)
process.description: New tires are mounted, balanced, and installed with proper torque.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, or as recommended in your owner's manual.

faqs.question: Do you sell tires?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a wide selection of new tires from leading brands at competitive prices.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Repair Partner in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied, with transparent pricing and exceptional craftsmanship.
story: Dallas Auto Repair was founded over 15 years ago with a simple mission: provide reliable, honest auto repair in Dallas. Since then, we've grown from a small two-bay shop to a full-service facility serving thousands of customers. Our team of ASE-certified technicians brings decades of combined experience, and we invest in the latest diagnostic equipment to ensure accurate repairs.

We believe in building long-term relationships with our customers. That's why we focus on clear communication, fair pricing, and quality workmanship. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine rebuild, we treat every vehicle as if it were our own. Our commitment to excellence has earned us a reputation as one of Dallas's most trusted auto repair shops.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always do what's right for our customers, even if it means recommending a less expensive repair.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting results.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: We explain every repair in plain language and provide detailed estimates before any work begins.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We go the extra mile to make sure you're happy with our service.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Contact us today.
